policy.title: Policy
policy.subtitle: Open the SCM staff policy PDF

rolesTraining.pageDescription: Approved roles are shown here together with key role guidance.

items.title: Seller
items.subtitle: Sales flow, customer service, and stand routines.

items.title: Stand Leader
items.subtitle: Briefing, delegation, and on-floor escalation.
items.body: Run the pre-door briefing, assign stand zones, monitor floats and stock levels, and escalate venue issues to the responsible manager without delay.

items.title: Other Info
items.subtitle: Shared expectations across every approved SCM role.
items.body: Follow meeting times, uniform instructions, and shift notes, use Check In / Out on the live shift day, and keep all practical questions in the linked shift thread.

checklists.pageDescription: Open the most common pre-shift and on-site reminders for SCM staff.

items.title: Gig Checklist
items.subtitle: What to confirm before you leave for the venue.
items.body: Review shift notes, confirm your meeting point and manager, charge your phone, pack your uniform, and make sure you can access the right documents before departure.

items.title: Equipment
items.subtitle: Core setup items to verify on site.
items.body: When relevant to the venue, confirm the pack includes Card terminals, Cash registers, Tents, Tables, Hotel rooms, Transport. Report missing setup items before doors open.

items.title: Tent
items.subtitle: Outdoor setup and weather-readiness basics.
items.body: For outdoor sales areas, confirm anchoring, weather cover, lighting, and safe walkways before opening so the setup stays compliant and safe.

items.title: Info Letter
items.subtitle: Operational notes you should read before arrival.
items.body: Read the event info letter ahead of time so you know access route, doors time, sales setup, and any promoter-specific instructions that affect the shift.

platformInfo.pageDescription: General reference information, contact paths, and quick platform guidance.

items.title: Contact
items.subtitle: Who to contact during a running shift.
items.body: Use the shift-linked chat first. For urgent operational issues, contact the responsible manager or project lead shown in your shift details.

items.title: FAQ
items.subtitle: Quick answers to common staff questions.
items.body: If you are unsure about timing, role scope, attendance, or documents, check the relevant guide first and then escalate in the shift thread if something is still unclear.

items.title: News
items.subtitle: Current notices from SCM operations.
items.body: Latest process updates, operational reminders, and rollout notes are shared here in the staff app and by your managers when something changes.

cashCard.pageDescription: Practical till, terminal, and closeout routines for running sales shifts.

items.title: Cash Handling
items.subtitle: Floats, counting, and reconciliation.
items.body: Count floats with a lead, never leave open cash unattended, and reconcile any differences before signing off at the end of the shift.

items.title: Card Terminals
items.subtitle: Startup, charging, and connectivity.
items.body: Check battery level, connectivity, receipt settings, and a payment test before doors. Report terminal issues immediately so the stand can stay live.

items.title: Closeout
items.subtitle: What must happen before tills are returned.
items.body: Run end-of-shift totals, return tills and accessories to the agreed handoff point, and confirm that time reporting matches the actual finish time.

arenaInfo.pageDescription: Filter countries first, then browse registered SCM arenas and venue notes.
arenaInfo.emptyStateMessage: No arenas are currently listed for this country.
